fields.dreamICP: plural ICP group in operator language — fills [dreamICP] slot in spine
fields.pain: 8-12 words, lowercase, no punctuation, natural complaint
fields.pain_consequence: what happens because of the pain — implication framing for senior ICP

_meta.rules: pain must be specific, lowercase, no corporate speak, max 12 words

staffing__it_services.dreamICP: IT managers at mid-market tech firms
staffing__it_services.pain: keep losing contractors mid-project because margins are too thin
staffing__it_services.pain_alt: can't find reliable contractors who actually show up long-term
staffing__it_services.pain_consequence: projects keep slipping because the contractor bench is always empty

staffing__hospitals.pain: can't fill last-minute shifts without paying agency premiums
staffing__hospitals.pain_alt: always short-staffed on nights and weekends and paying for it
staffing__hospitals.pain_consequence: patient care suffers every time a shift goes unfilled at premium cost

executive_search__saas.pain: keep interviewing VP Sales candidates who can't build a team
executive_search__saas.pain_alt: burning 4 months on exec searches that don't close
executive_search__saas.pain_consequence: revenue targets slip every quarter the VP Sales seat stays empty

staffing__hospitality.pain: can't hold onto floor staff long enough to stop rehiring constantly
staffing__hospitality.pain_alt: spending more time on hiring than running the actual operation
staffing__hospitality.pain_consequence: guest experience takes the hit every time a shift goes uncovered

staffing__accounting.pain: can't find experienced CPAs willing to take contract roles
staffing__accounting.pain_alt: losing billing hours every time a senior accountant goes permanent
staffing__accounting.pain_consequence: client deadlines get pushed because the bench is always short

permanent_recruiting__ai_ml.pain: everyone wants ML engineers but nobody can find ones who ship
permanent_recruiting__ai_ml.pain_alt: losing candidates to big tech offers before they even sign
permanent_recruiting__ai_ml.pain_consequence: roadmap keeps getting pushed because the core ML team is never complete

staffing__enterprise_software.dreamICP: HR leads at enterprise software firms
staffing__enterprise_software.pain: can't staff implementation projects fast enough when deals close
staffing__enterprise_software.pain_alt: always short on SAP and Oracle contractors when they're needed
staffing__enterprise_software.pain_consequence: client go-lives slip and renewals get awkward every time delivery is short-staffed

rpo__saas.dreamICP: heads of talent at scaling SaaS companies
rpo__saas.pain: internal recruiting team can't keep up with headcount targets
rpo__saas.pain_alt: hiring is slowing down growth more than the product ever did
rpo__saas.pain_consequence: board keeps asking why headcount is behind plan every single quarter

permanent_recruiting__it_services.dreamICP: talent leads at IT services firms
permanent_recruiting__it_services.pain: keep filling the same roles every 12 months when people leave
permanent_recruiting__it_services.pain_alt: can't retain tech hires long enough to recover placement costs
permanent_recruiting__it_services.pain_consequence: churn is eating margins and nobody has fixed the retention problem

permanent_recruiting__saas.pain: posting the same roles for 6 weeks and still interviewing wrong people
permanent_recruiting__saas.pain_alt: every bad hire costs 3 months to fix and nobody has that time
permanent_recruiting__saas.pain_consequence: team keeps doing extra work covering open seats while search drags on

staffing__specialty_trades.dreamICP: ops leads at construction and trades firms
staffing__specialty_trades.pain: can't staff skilled trades fast enough when projects ramp up
staffing__specialty_trades.pain_alt: constantly short on electricians and HVAC techs at peak season
staffing__specialty_trades.pain_consequence: project timelines blow out every time crew availability falls short

permanent_recruiting__enterprise_softwar.dreamICP: hiring managers at enterprise software firms
permanent_recruiting__enterprise_softwar.pain: finding engineers who know legacy stacks and actually want to work in them
permanent_recruiting__enterprise_softwar.pain_alt: losing senior devs to product companies before offers even go out
permanent_recruiting__enterprise_softwar.pain_consequence: technical debt grows faster when the only people who know the stack keep leaving

staffing__cybersecurity.pain: can't find vetted security contractors who clear background checks fast
staffing__cybersecurity.pain_alt: incident response gaps because headcount approvals take too long
staffing__cybersecurity.pain_consequence: exposure window stays open longer than it should every time a security role sits vacant

staffing__ai_ml.pain: nobody available for contract ML work who isn't already locked in
staffing__ai_ml.pain_alt: need to spin up a data team fast and the talent isn't there
staffing__ai_ml.pain_consequence: product launches keep getting pushed because the ML capacity just isn't there

executive_search__ai_ml.pain: searching for a head of AI who can actually lead researchers and ship
executive_search__ai_ml.pain_alt: can't tell who's genuinely technical vs just riding the AI wave
executive_search__ai_ml.pain_consequence: research stays theoretical and nothing ships without the right person at the top

executive_search__pharma.pain: can't fill senior regulatory roles without burning 3-4 months
executive_search__pharma.pain_alt: losing trial timelines every time a clinical lead position opens up
executive_search__pharma.pain_consequence: trial delays compound every month the regulatory seat stays empty

permanent_recruiting__cybersecurity.pain: security hiring is so niche that most agencies send completely wrong profiles
permanent_recruiting__cybersecurity.pain_alt: keep losing cleared candidates to government contracts mid-process
permanent_recruiting__cybersecurity.pain_consequence: team stays stretched thin and burnout hits before the right hire ever shows up

staffing__home_care.dreamICP: ops directors at home health agencies

staffing__home_care.pain_alt: always one caregiver no-show away from a compliance issue

staffing__education.pain: can't fill substitute and specialist roles before the semester starts

staffing__automotive.pain: production lines slowing down because skilled trades are impossible to find

staffing__automotive.pain_consequence: delivery commitments to OEMs get missed every time the line goes short

executive_search__it_services.pain: finding a GM who can actually grow revenue not just manage delivery
executive_search__it_services.pain_alt: searching for a COO who understands both delivery and new business
executive_search__it_services.pain_consequence: growth stalls at the same revenue number year after year without the right operator

executive_search__enterprise_software.pain: can't find a CRO who's actually built an enterprise sales motion before
executive_search__enterprise_software.pain_alt: every exec search takes 5 months and half end in a bad fit
executive_search__enterprise_software.pain_consequence: enterprise pipeline stays thin and the next funding round gets harder to justify

staffing__transportation_freight.pain: driver shortage is real and every agency sends the same recycled pool

staffing__transportation_freight.pain_consequence: loads get turned down and client relationships take the hit every time capacity falls short

permanent_recruiting__hospitals.pain: nursing shortages mean every open role has 3 urgent hires behind it

permanent_recruiting__legal.pain_consequence: client relationships walk out the door every time a senior associate leaves

permanent_recruiting__accounting.pain_alt: every busy season reveals the same gap in experienced staff
